module.name: War Strategy
module.description: Strategic military planning, battlefield tactics, and intelligence operations for modern warfare.

war_strategy_asymmetric_warfare.name: Asymmetric Warfare
war_strategy_asymmetric_warfare.description: Unconventional warfare tactics used against superior military forces.

war_strategy_cyber_warfare_strategy.name: Cyber Warfare Strategy
war_strategy_cyber_warfare_strategy.description: Developing offensive and defensive strategies in the realm of cyber conflict.

war_strategy_geopolitical_analysis.name: Geopolitical Analysis
war_strategy_geopolitical_analysis.description: Understanding the impact of global politics and economics on military strategies.

war_strategy_military_strategy.name: Military Strategy
war_strategy_military_strategy.description: Developing and executing strategic operations in large-scale warfare.

war_strategy_psychological_operations_ta.name: Psychological Operations Tactics
war_strategy_psychological_operations_ta.description: Using psychological influence to gain strategic advantages in warfare.

war_strategy_special_operations_planning.name: Special Operations Planning
war_strategy_special_operations_planning.description: Advanced planning and execution of covert and high-risk military operations.

war_strategy_asymmetric_warfare_counter_.name: Counter-Terrorism Operations
war_strategy_asymmetric_warfare_counter_.description: Tactics for neutralizing terrorist threats and preventing asymmetric attacks.

cards.title: Tracking and Surveillance of Threats
cards.description: Monitoring enemy movements and gathering actionable intelligence.
cards.bulletpoints: Utilize electronic surveillance, infiltrate hostile networks, and predict attacks
cards.summaryText: Focuses on surveillance nets, network penetration, and predictive intel to preempt strikes.

cards.title: Tactical Intervention and Rapid Response
cards.description: Executing precision operations to eliminate high-value threats.
cards.bulletpoints: Use breaching tactics, strategic containment, and rapid engagement protocols
cards.summaryText: Covers entry tactics, containment strategies, and speed-of-force maneuvers against priority targets.

war_strategy_asymmetric_warfare_insurgen.name: Insurgency Tactics
war_strategy_asymmetric_warfare_insurgen.description: Methods used by insurgent forces to destabilize superior military opponents.

cards.title: Hit-and-Run Attacks
cards.description: Executing rapid ambushes and withdrawing before retaliation.
cards.bulletpoints: Use speed, small unit coordination, and mobile concealment
cards.summaryText: Highlights fast ambush cycles, tight squad sync, and concealment to strike then vanish.

cards.title: Sabotage and Supply Chain Disruption
cards.description: Targeting logistical vulnerabilities to weaken enemy forces.
cards.bulletpoints: Disrupt supply lines, destroy key infrastructure, and utilize deception
cards.summaryText: Covers cutting logistics, wrecking infrastructure, and using deception to erode capability.

war_strategy_asymmetric_warfare_urban_wa.name: Urban Warfare Strategies
war_strategy_asymmetric_warfare_urban_wa.description: Tactics for engaging in combat within densely populated urban environments.

cards.title: Close-Quarters Battle Tactics
cards.description: Effective movement and engagement techniques for combat in confined spaces.
cards.bulletpoints: Utilize cover, room clearing maneuvers, and cornering strategies
cards.summaryText: Emphasizes cover usage, precision room clears, and angle control in cramped fights.

cards.title: High-Risk Extraction Operations
cards.description: Executing personnel extractions and hostage rescue missions in hostile urban zones.
cards.bulletpoints: Coordinate fireteams, use non-lethal options, and execute timed extractions
cards.summaryText: Covers synchronized teams, controlled force, and time-bound rescue sequencing in cities.

war_strategy_cyber_warfare_strategy_cybe.name: Cyber Intelligence Operations
war_strategy_cyber_warfare_strategy_cybe.description: Gathering intelligence from cyberspace for strategic advantage and security.

cards.title: Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) Gathering
cards.description: Using publicly available sources for cyber intelligence collection.
cards.bulletpoints: Social media monitoring, domain research, metadata analysis
cards.summaryText: Covers social harvests, infrastructure lookups, and metadata pivots for actionable OSINT.

cards.title: Dark Web Monitoring and Analysis
cards.description: Tracking underground cyber threats and illicit activities.
cards.bulletpoints: TOR network reconnaissance, marketplace intelligence, malware tracking
cards.summaryText: Details TOR recon, market surveillance, and malware tracing to surface hidden threats.

war_strategy_cyber_warfare_strategy_defe.name: Defensive Network Security
war_strategy_cyber_warfare_strategy_defe.description: Techniques for preventing cyber intrusions and securing sensitive systems.

cards.title: Threat Detection and Response
cards.description: Identifying and mitigating cyber threats in real-time.
cards.bulletpoints: Intrusion detection, SIEM analysis, forensic investigation
cards.summaryText: Run layered monitoring that correlates IDS alerts with SIEM dashboards, triages anomalies in minutes, and launches forensic capture to understand and contain attackers before they pivot.

cards.title: Incident Response Planning
cards.description: Developing rapid response strategies for cyber incidents.
cards.bulletpoints: Containment strategies, threat intelligence sharing, rapid remediation
cards.summaryText: Keep an updated incident playbook that locks down compromised assets, routes intel to partners, and coordinates remediation waves so services restore quickly with lessons fed into the next cycle.

war_strategy_cyber_warfare_strategy_offe.name: Offensive Cyber Tactics
war_strategy_cyber_warfare_strategy_offe.description: Techniques for cyber attacks, penetration testing, and network exploitation.

cards.title: Advanced Exploitation Techniques
cards.description: Utilizing zero-day vulnerabilities and advanced hacking methods.
cards.bulletpoints: Exploit chaining, privilege escalation, persistence mechanisms
cards.summaryText: Chain fresh exploits to punch through modern defenses, escalate privileges immediately, and seed durable persistence so follow-on operators inherit full control.

cards.title: Command and Control (C2) Frameworks
cards.description: Using advanced C2 infrastructures for stealthy remote access.
cards.bulletpoints: Develop C2 infrastructure, evade detection, maintain persistence
cards.summaryText: Stand up resilient C2 channels with rotating infrastructure, shift traffic patterns to dodge detection, and quietly maintain access for long-haul operations.

war_strategy_geopolitical_analysis_econo.name: Economic Sanctions Tactics
war_strategy_geopolitical_analysis_econo.description: Strategies for leveraging economic power as a means of warfare.

cards.title: Strategic Use of Sanctions
cards.description: Understanding the impact of financial restrictions on global actors.
cards.bulletpoints: Case studies on U.S. sanctions, impact on adversaries, countermeasures
cards.summaryText: Dissect landmark U.S. sanction campaigns to gauge economic pressure points, anticipate adversary workarounds, and tune restrictions for maximum geopolitical leverage.

cards.title: Bypassing and Countering Sanctions
cards.description: Methods countries use to evade and counteract sanctions.
cards.bulletpoints: Cryptocurrency laundering, offshore banking, black market trade
cards.summaryText: Map how targets wash funds through crypto, offshore havens, and shadow markets so defensive teams can flag evasion pipelines and tighten enforcement.

war_strategy_geopolitical_analysis_globa.name: Global Conflict Trends
war_strategy_geopolitical_analysis_globa.description: Analyzing historical and emerging global conflicts and their strategic implications.

cards.title: Major Wars and Conflicts
cards.description: Studying key military conflicts and their strategic lessons.
cards.bulletpoints: WWII, Cold War proxy wars, modern hybrid warfare case studies
cards.summaryText: Compare WWII coalitions, Cold War proxy showdowns, and hybrid campaigns to spot recurring escalation patterns and modernize force planning.

cards.title: Current Geopolitical Tensions
cards.description: Tracking ongoing global disputes and potential hotspots.
cards.bulletpoints: South China Sea, Ukraine conflict, Middle Eastern tensions
cards.summaryText: Monitor flashpoints like the South China Sea, Ukraine, and Middle East to forecast trigger events and shape diplomatic or military posture in advance.

war_strategy_geopolitical_analysis_polit.name: Political Warfare Analysis
war_strategy_geopolitical_analysis_polit.description: Understanding the use of political influence and subversion as a tool of warfare.

cards.title: Election Interference Tactics
cards.description: Analyzing state-sponsored influence campaigns on global elections.
cards.bulletpoints: Misinformation campaigns, social media manipulation, hacking voter infrastructure
cards.summaryText: Deconstruct election meddling playbooks that blend misinformation blitzes, social bots, and targeted intrusions against voter systems to harden democratic defenses.

cards.title: Psychological Warfare in Politics
cards.description: How political entities use psychological manipulation to control narratives.
cards.bulletpoints: Propaganda frameworks, mass perception control, media warfare
cards.summaryText: Trace how narrative architects weaponize propaganda frameworks and media ecosystems to steer public sentiment and neutralize opposition.

war_strategy_military_strategy_combined_.name: Combined Arms Operations
war_strategy_military_strategy_combined_.description: Coordinating multiple branches of military forces for joint operations.

cards.title: Coordinating Air and Ground Forces
cards.description: Using air superiority to support ground combat operations.
cards.bulletpoints: Close air support, joint strike coordination, aerial reconnaissance
cards.summaryText: Blend close air support, synchronized strikes, and live ISR feeds so ground units punch through defenses under a protective air umbrella.

cards.title: Naval and Amphibious Operations
cards.description: Integrating naval forces in land-based combat.
cards.bulletpoints: Amphibious landings, fleet support, carrier strike group tactics
cards.summaryText: Stage amphibious assaults with carrier-backed fires and fleet logistics to secure beachheads and sustain land advances from the sea.

war_strategy_military_strategy_force_man.name: Force Maneuvering
war_strategy_military_strategy_force_man.description: Advanced tactics for positioning and movement of military forces to gain strategic advantage.

cards.title: Flanking and Encirclement Tactics
cards.description: Using positioning to neutralize enemy forces through flanking and encirclement.
cards.bulletpoints: Pincer movements, hammer-and-anvil tactics, blitzkrieg strategies
cards.summaryText: Design fast-moving pincer packages that hit from multiple axes, collapse enemy lines, and close the encirclement before relief forces arrive.

cards.title: Rapid Deployment and Mobility
cards.description: Utilizing speed and terrain for effective force deployment.
cards.bulletpoints: Airborne insertions, mechanized warfare, strategic positioning
cards.summaryText: Combine airborne drops, mechanized thrusts, and terrain-aware staging to reposition forces faster than adversaries can react.

war_strategy_military_strategy_supply_ch.name: Supply Chain Tactics
war_strategy_military_strategy_supply_ch.description: Logistical strategies for maintaining a steady flow of supplies in warfare scenarios.

cards.title: Supply Line Defense and Disruption
cards.description: Strategies for securing and disrupting enemy supply chains.
cards.bulletpoints: Logistical hubs, interdiction operations, convoy protection
cards.summaryText: Fortify your own hubs while planning interdiction raids and convoy escorts that choke enemy supplies without starving friendly forces.

cards.title: Sustaining Operations in Warzones
cards.description: Ensuring continuous resupply during prolonged engagements.
cards.bulletpoints: Strategic stockpiling, resupply missions, wartime rationing
cards.summaryText: Balance stockpiles, rotating resupply missions, and ration policies so frontline units stay equipped through drawn-out campaigns.

war_strategy_psychological_operations_ta.name: Counter-PsyOps Strategies
war_strategy_psychological_operations_ta.description: Recognizing and neutralizing psychological influence tactics used against target populations.

cards.title: Detecting Psychological Manipulation
cards.description: Techniques for identifying subliminal and overt influence tactics.
cards.bulletpoints: Gaslighting indicators, false flag recognition, mass conditioning techniques
cards.summaryText: Build detection checklists that flag gaslighting tells, staged false flags, and conditioning loops before audiences internalize hostile narratives.

cards.title: Reversing Propaganda Effects
cards.description: Methods for countering enemy PsyOps and restoring critical thinking.
cards.bulletpoints: Deprogramming strategies, controlled narrative dismantling, truth injection techniques
cards.summaryText: Deploy deprogramming campaigns that dismantle hostile messaging, inject verified truths, and rebuild resilient public perception.

war_strategy_psychological_operations_ta.name: Covert Psychological Warfare
war_strategy_psychological_operations_ta.description: Using deception, misinformation, and psychological triggers to disrupt enemy forces.

cards.title: Planting False Information
cards.description: Techniques for spreading misinformation to destabilize adversaries.
cards.bulletpoints: Seeding fake reports, controlled opposition, deepfake tactics
cards.summaryText: Design misinformation drops, controlled opposition narratives, and deepfake releases that fracture enemy trust networks without exposing the source.

cards.title: Psychological Shock and Awe
cards.description: Utilizing fear, confusion, and unpredictability to break enemy morale.
cards.bulletpoints: Sensory overload, fear-based narratives, symbolic warfare
cards.summaryText: Stage shock campaigns combining sensory overload, fear messaging, and symbolic strikes to paralyze decision makers and erode morale.

war_strategy_psychological_operations_ta.name: Influence Campaigns
war_strategy_psychological_operations_ta.description: Designing and executing influence operations to control narratives and public perception.

cards.title: Constructing Effective Narratives
cards.description: Techniques for shaping public perception through persuasive storytelling.
cards.bulletpoints: Emotional triggers, hero vs villain dynamics, repetition strategies
cards.summaryText: Craft story arcs packed with emotional hooks and clear heroes vs villains, then repeat them across channels until they set the public frame.

cards.title: Target Audience Manipulation
cards.description: Identifying psychological weak points in different demographics.
cards.bulletpoints: Demographic profiling, cognitive biases, psychographic targeting
cards.summaryText: Profile audiences by bias and psychographics to tailor messaging that slips past defenses and nudges chosen behaviors.

war_strategy_special_operations_planning.name: Covert Infiltration Methods
war_strategy_special_operations_planning.description: Training in silent entry, disguise, and stealth movement for deep-cover operations.

cards.title: Silent Entry Techniques
cards.description: Approaching and breaching enemy territory without detection.
cards.bulletpoints: Noise discipline, shadow positioning, silent movement drills
cards.summaryText: Practice noise-free movement, shadow hugging, and low-signature breaching so teams slip inside targets unnoticed.

cards.title: Advanced Camouflage and Disguise
cards.description: Utilizing environment and disguise to remain undetected in hostile zones.
cards.bulletpoints: Urban camouflage, identity forging, environmental adaptation
cards.summaryText: Layer disguises with environmental cues and forged identities to blend into any terrain or population for extended cover.

war_strategy_special_operations_planning.name: Extraction and Escape Tactics
war_strategy_special_operations_planning.description: Advanced techniques for escaping hostile zones and extracting high-value personnel.

cards.title: Evading Pursuers and Escape Routes
cards.description: Utilizing terrain and cover to evade detection and reach extraction points.
cards.bulletpoints: Escape route planning, terrain utilization, counter-tracking techniques
cards.summaryText: Scout redundant escape lanes, use terrain masking, and deploy counter-tracking tricks to shake pursuit and hit the pickup zone clean.

cards.title: Tactical Extraction of High-Value Targets
cards.description: Planning and executing rescue operations under high-risk conditions.
cards.bulletpoints: Fast extraction planning, defensive positioning, securing personnel
cards.summaryText: Coordinate rapid extraction teams that secure the package, hold defensive arcs, and exfil under layered contingency plans.

war_strategy_special_operations_planning.name: Mission Planning and Execution
war_strategy_special_operations_planning.description: Comprehensive training in planning and executing high-stakes special operations missions.

cards.title: Developing Mission Blueprints
cards.description: Creating a structured plan for executing covert and high-risk operations.
cards.bulletpoints: Objective assessment, risk mitigation, contingency planning
cards.summaryText: Draft mission blueprints that clarify objectives, map risks, and bake in layered contingencies before teams step off.

cards.title: Team Coordination and Execution
cards.description: Executing missions with precise team-based coordination and dynamic adaptability.
cards.bulletpoints: Command hierarchy, rapid decision-making, mission flow adjustments
cards.summaryText: Rehearse command hierarchies and rapid comms so operators adapt on the fly while keeping mission flow tight.
